title: 面试
description_uz: «Omad! Sen uddalashingga ishonaman.» — Bir do'st ish suhbatiga shoshilayotgan o'rtog'ini quvvatlaydi, keyin natijani so'raydi. Bu dialog savol berish, hayajonni ifodalash va dalda berishni mashq qiladi, ikki bo'limli — suhbatdan oldin va keyin. Foydali, kar'erga oid mavzu. Rolli o'yin orqali ishonchli nutqni mashq qiling.
description_ru: «Удачи! Уверен, у тебя получится.» — Друг подбадривает приятеля перед собеседованием, а потом расспрашивает о результате. Этот диалог тренирует вопросы, выражение волнения и поддержку, и состоит из двух частей — до и после интервью. Полезная карьерная тема. Через ролевую игру отрабатывайте уверенную речь.
description_en: «Good luck! I believe you can do it.» — A friend cheers on another rushing to a job interview, then asks how it went. This dialogue practices asking questions, expressing nerves, and offering encouragement, in two parts — before and after the interview. A useful career topic. Use role-play to practice speaking with confidence.

sentences.text_original: 你今天穿得这么正式，要去哪里？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān chuān de zhème zhèngshì, yào qù nǎli?
sentences.text_translation: Bugun shunday rasmiy kiyinibsan, qayerga ketyapsan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты сегодня так официально одет — куда собрался?
sentences.text_translation_en: You're dressed so formally today — where are you going?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiàwǔ yǒu yí ge miànshì.
sentences.text_translation: Tushdan keyin bitta ish suhbatim bor.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have a job interview this afternoon.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 翻译，跟我的专业很匹配。
sentences.pinyin: Fānyì, gēn wǒ de zhuānyè hěn pǐpèi.
sentences.text_translation: Tarjimonlik, mening mutaxassisligimga juda mos keladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Переводчик — это очень подходит моей специальности.
sentences.text_translation_en: Translation — it matches my major really well.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhǔnbèi le duō jiǔ le?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long have you been preparing?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_ru: Какие вопросы обычно задают на собеседовании?
sentences.text_translation_en: What questions do they usually ask in interviews?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 他们会问我的翻译经验、为什么想换工作，还有未来的计划。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen huì wèn wǒ de fānyì jīngyàn, wèishénme xiǎng huàn gōngzuò, hái yǒu wèilái de jìhuà.
sentences.text_translation: Ular tarjimonlik tajribamni, nega ish almashtirmoqchiligimni va kelajak rejalarimni so'rashadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спросят про мой опыт перевода, почему хочу сменить работу, и про планы на будущее.
sentences.text_translation_en: They'll ask about my translation experience, why I want to change jobs, and my future plans.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 有一点紧张，但是我已经准备好了。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn jǐnzhāng, dànshì wǒ yǐjīng zhǔnbèi hǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz hayajonlanyapman, lekin allaqachon tayyorman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного волнуюсь, но я уже готов.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little nervous, but I'm already prepared.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: Good luck! I believe you can do it.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！面完以后我给你打电话。
sentences.pinyin: Xièxie! Miàn wán yǐhòu wǒ gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Suhbat tugagach senga qo'ng'iroq qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! I'll call you after the interview.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 还不错！面试官很友好，问的问题我都回答了。
sentences.pinyin: Hái búcuò! Miànshìguān hěn yǒuhǎo, wèn de wèntí wǒ dōu huídá le.
sentences.text_translation: Yomon emas! Suhbat oluvchi juda xushmuomala edi, so'ralgan savollarning hammasiga javob berdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Неплохо! Интервьюер был очень дружелюбным, на все вопросы я ответил.
sentences.text_translation_en: Pretty good! The interviewer was very friendly, and I answered all the questions.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 他们有说什么时候给结果吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen yǒu shuō shénme shíhou gěi jiéguǒ ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Did they say when they'll give the results?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 说这周内会通知我，让我等电话。
sentences.pinyin: Shuō zhè zhōu nèi huì tōngzhī wǒ, ràng wǒ děng diànhuà.
sentences.text_translation: Shu hafta ichida xabar berishlarini, qo'ng'iroqni kutib turishimni aytishdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сказали, что уведомят меня в течение недели, и попросили ждать звонка.
sentences.text_translation_en: They said they'll notify me within this week and told me to wait for a call.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà yīnggāi kuài le. Zhù nǐ hǎoyùn!
sentences.text_translation: Unda tez orada bo'lsa kerak. Omad tilayman!
sentences.text_translation_en: Then it should be soon. Good luck!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! I hope it works out.
sentences.speaker: B
